name: Thai Chicken with Fresh Basil
recipeInstructions:
1. Skin the chicken and cut into 1.25 x 1 in strips.
2. Remove stems from serrano chilies and cut lengthwise into thin strips; discard seeds.
3. Heat oil in a wok or large skillet over high heat.
4. Add garlic and stir until golden brown, about 10 seconds.
5. Add half of the basil and chilies; stir-fry until basil wilts, about 1 minute.
6. Add chicken and stir-fry for about 3 minutes.
7. Add nuoc nam, water, and sugar; stir-fry until sauce bubbles and thickens slightly, about 2 minutes.
8. Add remaining basil; stir-fry until just wilted, about 5 seconds.
9. Serve immediately with steamed rice.
From: clay@panix.com (Clay Irving)
